improvements.description: Removed local getErrorMessage() duplicate and imported from shared src/lib/errors.ts (DRY principle). The same function was duplicated across 6+ files; new code should use the shared utility.
Updated buildDetectPromptOptions JSDoc comment: tool count from 5 to 6, migration threshold from 6th to 7th tool. Keeps documentation accurate after copilot addition.
Updated module JSDoc to include Copilot in the list of supported CLI tools for accurate documentation.
Updated module JSDoc to include copilot in the supported tools list for accurate documentation.

review_notes.security: Confirmed: copilot.ts uses execFile (not exec) for isInstalled() 2-stage check. No shell injection risk. COPILOT_PROMPT_PATTERN uses /m flag correctly without /g (avoids stateful test()).
review_notes.consistency: CopilotTool follows the same structural pattern as GeminiTool (waitForReady, waitForPrompt, sendMessage flow). command='gh' is correctly mapped via getCommandForTool() in claude-executor.ts.
review_notes.type_safety: CLI_TOOL_IDS includes 'copilot', CLIToolType union is correctly derived. CLI_TOOL_DISPLAY_NAMES includes copilot entry. All switch statements in cli-patterns.ts cover 'copilot' case.
review_notes.test_quality: Tests cover tool properties, session name generation (including security validation for slashes), isInstalled 2-stage check (both success and partial/full failure), interface compliance. Coverage is adequate for the new code.
review_notes.pre_existing_failure: 1 test failure in tests/unit/cli-tools/base.test.ts (unhandled rejection from tmux send-keys) is pre-existing and unrelated to Issue #545 changes.

message: Refactoring complete. Removed getErrorMessage duplication in copilot.ts (now imports from shared errors.ts). Updated documentation comments to reflect 6-tool count. All quality checks pass.
